description: Use this API to import a rawx (extended raw data) data table from a CSV (comma-separated values) file. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.1.0. ierr = csv_to_rawx(tblname, sfile)

parameters.name: tblname
parameters.description: Name of the data table to import into (not case sensitive). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: sfile
parameters.description: File path of the csv input file. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
